summary: Plan-only PR inventory assessment. No GitHub mutations are allowed by the job. I treated the provided cluster preflight artifact as live state for this run and did not use external evidence.

actions.reason: Broad session-state/auth-provider change needs maintainer judgment before merge or repair planning.
Narrow contributor PR with maintainer_can_modify=true should be repaired and revalidated before any merge recommendation.
Concrete review-bot finding can be repaired narrowly before revalidation.
Focused PR should get a narrow repair/re-review pass before merge consideration.
Useful contributor PR with unresolved/review-truncated bot findings needs a narrow repair and fresh review before merge.
Security-sensitive linked PR is out of scope for Clownfish backlog remediation.
Historical linked context only; no action needed.
Related model fallback work with distinct semantics and proof/design gaps.
Emit an executable narrow fix artifact for the clearest repairable PR while leaving broader or under-specified repairs as item-level fix_needed.
Concrete narrow repair path exists and can be applied by Clownfish scripts in a later execute/autonomous run.

needs_human: #85643 requires maintainer judgment because it is a broad XL session/auth-provider/model-pin change and lacks complete merge_preflight despite passing checks.
#79655, #92731, and #42637 need fresh repair/re-review passes, but this compacted artifact does not expose enough current actionable findings to produce complete executable patch artifacts for each.
